column2: Complete the tutorial to learn the rules of the game.
Flip an opponent's piece for the first time.
Promote a Cob to a Rok for the first time.
Win your first game against the AI.
Complete 10 games against the AI.
Capture 50 enemy pieces in total.
Promote 25 Cobs to Roks across all games.
Win 10 games against the AI.
Win a game on Champion difficulty.
Win a game by Mit: capture every enemy piece.
Win a game by Stalemit: leave your opponent with no legal moves.
Win a game by triple repetition.
Claim a draw using the fifty-move rule.
Promote a dead Cob to win the game.
Win 50 games against the AI.
Win on Champion difficulty on October 31st to unlock the Halloween theme forever.
Win on Champion difficulty on December 25th to unlock the Christmas theme forever.
Win a game on Easy difficulty.
Win a game on Medium difficulty.
Win a game on Hard difficulty.
Win a game as White on April 4th–6th to unlock an exclusive palette forever.
Win a game as Black on April 4th–6th to unlock an exclusive palette forever.
